name: Ad.Plus
description: AI-optimized mobile, web, video, CTV and audio ad monetization for publishers with interstitial, banner, and native formats.

seo.title: Ad.Plus — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Ad.Plus: AI-optimized mobile, web, video, CTV and audio ad monetization for publishers with interstitial, banner, and native formats.

when_to_use: Monetizing mobile web inventory with AI-optimized CPM floors
Adding CTV ad monetization to streaming publisher inventory
Serving interstitial and native ads across mobile apps without mediation SDK
Enabling audio ad monetization for podcast and audio publisher apps

pros: Covers mobile, web, CTV and audio in one SSP
AI waterfall optimization out of the box
cons: Smaller demand pool than tier-1 SSPs
Documentation is thin for SDK integration
Fill rates inconsistent outside top geos
review.verdict: Convenient multi-format monetization, but eCPMs lag larger SSPs unless you have tier-1 traffic.
review.best_for: Mid-size publishers wanting one SSP across web, app, CTV without juggling vendors.
review.not_for: Publishers with high-value US/EU traffic who need top-tier demand competition.

lock_in.reason: Ad revenue optimization bound to publisher SDK integration

developer_experience.reason: Mobile SDKs for iOS/Android/Unity; standard ad integration
